FOOTER.DESCRIPTION: Crowdfunding platform created to support women-led projects.

AUTH.PASSWORD_ERROR: Password must be at least 6 characters
AUTH.NAME: Full name
AUTH.NAME_ERROR: Name must be at least 2 characters
AUTH.ROLE: How do you want to participate?

CATEGORIES.DETAIL_SUBTITLE: Explore campaigns in this category and support the causes you care about most.
CATEGORIES.PLACEHOLDER_NOTE: Campaigns will appear here once connected to the backend.

HOME.HERO_SUBTITLE: 4TheWomen is the platform where women's ideas come to life thanks to a community that believes in them. Give visibility, donate, create, contribute.
HOME.ABOUT_TITLE: We were born to end women's anonymity
HOME.ABOUT_P1: Thanks to the experience at People, we have been able to fight against the invisibilization of women as victims in society. After this experience, we decided to go further: to end anonymity and empower women to make their projects visible.
HOME.ABOUT_P2: As we say at People: many small people in small places can change the world. That is why we created a crowdfunding platform directed solely and exclusively at financing projects led by women.
HOME.HOW_TITLE: Three steps to make your project a reality
HOME.HOW_SUBTITLE: The process is simple, secure and fully supported by our validation team.
HOME.STEP_1_DESC: Describe your project, set your goal and upload the necessary documentation for our manual validation process.
HOME.STEP_2_DESC: Once validated, share your campaign with your community and start receiving donations securely through Stripe.
HOME.STEP_3_DESC: Receive the funds and fulfil your commitment by publishing periodic updates for your donors.
HOME.VALUE_1_DESC: We believe in collective power. Every small contribution adds up to change real lives.
HOME.VALUE_2_DESC: Manual validation of every campaign and payments managed with bank-grade encryption through Stripe.
HOME.VALUE_3_DESC: We focus exclusively on projects with verified female leadership to maximise impact.
HOME.VALUE_4_DESC: We require periodic updates from campaign creators and publish annual impact reports.
HOME.MISSION_TITLE: One more drop in the recognition of women
HOME.MISSION_P1: This is one more contribution to the recognition of women and their involvement in different spaces of society. Do you want to contribute to the disappearance of the 'Anonymous'? That is the objective of 4TheWomen.
HOME.MISSION_P2: Give visibility, donate, implement, create, contribute. Join the community that is changing the world, one project at a time.
HOME.TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: Thanks to 4TheWomen I was able to fund my sewing workshop and now I employ five women from my neighbourhood.
HOME.TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: The manual validation gave me a confidence I don't find on other platforms. I know my money goes where it says.
HOME.TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: The team's support was key. Within two weeks we had 80% of our goal covered.
HOME.CTA_SUBTITLE: Join thousands of women who are already changing the world through 4TheWomen.

LEGAL.TERMS_INTRO: Welcome to 4THEWOMEN, the crowdfunding platform dedicated to empowering female leadership, managed by the People association, supporting abused women. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by the following Terms and Conditions.
LEGAL.TERMS_S1_BODY: 4thewomen acts exclusively as a technical intermediary. We provide the digital space for Promoters (self-employed women, women-led businesses and associations) to present their projects and for Donors to make financial contributions. IMPORTANT: 4thewomen is not a financial institution, nor does it guarantee the achievement of the objectives of published projects.
LEGAL.TERMS_S2_BODY: To publish a campaign, the Promoter must pass a Manual Validation process. ID, tax certificates or statutes will be required depending on the profile. The Promoter guarantees that all submitted documentation is authentic and current. People reserves the right to reject projects that do not demonstrate real female leadership in their decision-making structure.
LEGAL.TERMS_S3_BODY: The donation agreement is established directly between the Donor and the Promoter. 4thewomen is not responsible for the execution, quality, legality or success of the funded project. The Donor assumes the risk that the project may not be carried out or may not meet the expectations generated by the Promoter.
LEGAL.TERMS_S4_BODY: To the maximum extent permitted by law, 4thewomen is exempt from all liability for: (1) Non-compliance by the Promoter, if they do not use funds for the stated purpose or fail to deliver promised rewards. (2) Identity fraud through forged documents that pass reasonable controls. (3) Indirect losses: any consequential damage arising from the use of the platform.
LEGAL.TERMS_S5_BODY: People will receive a commission on the total raised for management, maintenance and manual validation. Payment gateway fees (Stripe) will be deducted from the gross amount before transfer to the Promoter. Once funds are transferred to the Promoter, People cannot manage refunds; the Donor must claim directly from the Promoter.
LEGAL.TERMS_S6_BODY: The Promoter commits to: using funds entirely for the purpose described in the campaign, reporting periodically on project progress through the Transparency tab, and complying with all fiscal obligations arising from receipt of funds.
LEGAL.TERMS_S7_BODY: People will cooperate with competent authorities if suspicious activity is detected. We reserve the right to freeze funds and cancel campaigns if there are indications of illegal activity.
LEGAL.TERMS_S8_BODY: The Promoter declares ownership of all images, videos and texts uploaded to the platform. By publishing them, they grant People a free licence to use them for promotional purposes.
LEGAL.TERMS_S9_BODY: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of the city of Madrid.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_INTRO: At People, we take the privacy of our users and donors very seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, why we need it and how we protect it.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S1_BODY: Owner: ASOCIACIÓN PEOPLE ACOMPAÑANDO A LA MUJER MALTRATADA — NIF: G-87716015 — Contact email: peopleasociacion@gmail.com
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S2_BODY: Promoters: To validate your identity through manual document review (ID, tax certificates, deeds) to prevent fraud and money laundering. Donors: To manage contributions and send donation certificates or project updates. Communications: To send our newsletter and security notices only with your explicit consent.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S3_BODY: We process your data based on: (1) Performance of a contract, to allow you to publish projects or make donations. (2) Legal obligation: compliance with Anti-Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Law. (3) Legitimate interest: ensuring platform security and verifying female leadership of projects.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S4_BODY: Registration data: name, email, phone. Verification data (Promoters): ID/NIE image, articles of incorporation, board minutes and census certificates. Payment data: we do not store card numbers; payments are processed securely through Stripe Connect.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S5_TITLE: 5. Who Do We Share Your Data With?
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S5_BODY: Your data is not sold to third parties. It is only shared with: Stripe, to process transactions and comply with KYC/KYB regulations; authorities, when there is a legal obligation or court order; and donors, who will only see public project data.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S6_BODY: We will retain identity documents and transaction records for the period required by tax and anti-money laundering regulations (generally 10 years after account closure).
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S7_BODY: You may exercise your rights of Access, Rectification, Cancellation and Opposition by emailing peopleasociacion@gmail.com. You have the right to know what data we hold about you and to request its deletion when no longer necessary.
LEGAL.PRIVACY_S8_BODY: Validation documents (ID, deeds) are stored on secure servers with bank-grade encryption. Only authorised personnel in our validation department have access to this information for the audit process.
LEGAL.COOKIES_INTRO: At People we use cookies to facilitate your browsing and ensure the platform works securely. Here we explain what they are, which ones we use and how you can manage them.
LEGAL.COOKIES_S1_BODY: A cookie is a small text file downloaded to your device (computer, smartphone or tablet) when you access our website. They allow the platform to remember your preferences, recognise your session and improve your experience.
LEGAL.COOKIES_S2_BODY: Technical Cookies (Necessary): essential for the website to work; they keep you logged in and allow security systems to detect fraud — cannot be disabled. Personalisation Cookies: remember your language or region preferences. Analytics Cookies (Statistics): help us understand how users interact with People via Google Analytics; only active if you accept. Payment Gateway Cookies (Stripe): essential for secure transactions.
LEGAL.COOKIES_S3_BODY: PHPSESSID (People) — Keep session active — Duration: Session. __stripe_mid (Stripe) — Fraud prevention in payments — Duration: 1 year. _ga (Google) — Web analytics (visits and traffic) — Duration: 2 years. cookie_consent (People) — Remember banner preference — Duration: 1 year.
LEGAL.COOKIES_S4_BODY: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Check the help documentation for Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox or Safari for more information on managing cookies in your browser.
LEGAL.COOKIES_S5_BODY: By clicking "Accept" on the cookie banner you consent to the use of all cookies mentioned. If you click "Configure", you can choose which ones to allow and which to reject.
LEGAL.TRANSPARENCY_INTRO: At People, trust is our most valuable asset. We want every donor to know exactly what happens with their money from the moment they click "Donate" until the project led by a woman becomes a reality.
LEGAL.TRANSPARENCY_S1_BODY: Unlike automated platforms, at People we manually review every identity document, company deed and association statutes. We confirm that behind every campaign there is a real woman or an entity with verified female leadership. If documents do not match public records or we detect irregularities, the campaign is never published.
LEGAL.TRANSPARENCY_S2_BODY: When you make a donation: (1) The money enters through Stripe, a global standard in banking security. (2) Funds are held in a secure technical account while the campaign is active. (3) They are distributed between the Promoter to execute their project, People's Management Commission for maintenance, manual validations and technical support, and direct card processing fees.
LEGAL.TRANSPARENCY_S3_BODY: We require our promoters to publish updates when they reach 50% and 100% of their goal. Once the campaign ends, they must upload evidence that funds are being applied to the promised purpose.
LEGAL.TRANSPARENCY_S4_BODY: People commits to publishing an annual impact summary detailing: number of validated and published projects, total funds raised by the community, and success stories of women and organisations that have grown thanks to your support.
LEGAL.ABOUT_INTRO: Crowdfunding platform dedicated exclusively to financing projects led by women. Crowdfunding for Women by Women.
LEGAL.ABOUT_S1_BODY: Thanks to the experience at People, we have been able to fight against the invisibilisation of women as victims in society. After this experience, we decided to go further: to end anonymity and empower women to make their projects visible. Do you want to contribute to the disappearance of the "Anonymous"? That is the objective of 4TheWomen.
LEGAL.ABOUT_S2_BODY: This is one more drop, one more contribution to the recognition of women and their involvement in different spaces of society. As we say at People: many small people in small places can change the world. That is why we created a crowdfunding platform directed solely and exclusively at financing projects led by women.
LEGAL.ABOUT_S3_BODY: Give visibility, donate, implement, create, contribute.
LEGAL.PAGE_SUBTITLE: Here you will find all the legal information about the platform: terms of use, privacy, cookies, transparency and who we are.
